title: Device Home Screen - Limited Support After Launch Date When LM Version Is Below Required
scenario: Limited support pop-up dismissed when tapping outside on Poly Studio Mobile app with unsupported device and outdated Lens Mobile version
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on a mobile device running an older version of the app that does not yet support a newly released Poly Bluetooth audio device.
2. Connect the newly released Poly Bluetooth audio device to the mobile device via Bluetooth.
3. Observe the app's Home screen for the connection state of the device.
4. If the device's Lens Mobile (LM) version is below the required minimum version, note the pop-up that appears on screen.
5. Read the pop-up message: "Device support is limited. Update the Poly Lens Mobile app to enable full functionality."
6. Tap anywhere outside the pop-up to dismiss it.
expected: The app displays a pop-up with the message: "Device support is limited. Update the Poly Lens Mobile app to enable full functionality." Tapping outside the pop-up dismisses it.
